intro.text: A family table in the heart of Delémont, where the recipes of Eritrea and Ethiopia are shared the way they are at home — injera in the middle, hands all around.

dishes.title: Signature dishes
dishes.doro: Chicken stew simmered in berbere, hard-boiled egg, on injera.
dishes.kitfo: Minced beef with mitmita and niter kibbeh, served warm.
dishes.tibs: Beef sautéed with onions, peppers and fresh rosemary.
dishes.savanna: A grand sharing platter, meat or vegetarian, on injera.
dishes.kutfo: Beef tartare with spiced butter, red chilli and black pepper.
dishes.tiebsi: Beef or lamb strips with vegetables and spices, on injera.

menu.title: The menu
menu.sub: Everything is shared. Injera is your plate and your cutlery — tear it, scoop, savour.
menu.drinks_soon: Our drinks list is coming soon.

dish.sambusa: Crisp pastries filled with spiced lentils.
dish.timatim: Tomato, onion and green chilli salad, lemon dressing.
dish.full: Simmered fava beans, tomato, onion and olive oil, warm bread.
dish.doro: Chicken stew simmered in berbere, hard-boiled egg, on injera.
dish.kitfo: Minced beef with mitmita and niter kibbeh, served warm.
dish.tibs: Beef sautéed with onions, peppers and fresh rosemary.
dish.zilzil: Thin strips of marinated beef, seared to order.
dish.shiro: Chickpea purée sharpened with green chilli, garlic and onions, on injera.
dish.misir: Red lentils stewed in a spicy berbere sauce.
dish.beyaynetu: A selection of vegetable and legume purées on a large injera.
dish.plateau: A selection of our specialities for two, on a large injera.
dish.tej: House Ethiopian honey wine, sweet and fragrant.
dish.ceremony: Beans roasted before you, incense, three servings. For the table.
dish.bunna: Bold Ethiopian coffee, served in a small cup.
dish.chai: Spiced black tea with cardamom and ginger.
dish.salade: House mixed salad, at the chef's whim.
dish.samosa_veg: Crisp pastry parcels filled with spiced vegetables.
dish.samosa_viande: Crisp pastry parcels filled with spiced meat.
dish.degustation: Yellow lentils, chickpeas, spinach, spiced potatoes and fresh cheese, on injera. A spicy dish — tell us your preference.
dish.degustation_viande: Yellow lentils, chickpeas, spinach, spiced potatoes, fresh cheese and simmered beef, on injera. Spicy, to your taste.
dish.tiebsi: Beef or lamb strips with onions, garlic, tomatoes, green salad, chilli and spices, on injera.
dish.kikil: Slow-cooked lamb soup with onions, curry and green chilli (contains bones), on injera.
dish.shekla: Minced beef with onions, green chilli and spices, served on injera.
dish.kutfo: Hand-chopped beef tartare with spiced house butter, red chilli and black pepper, on injera.
dish.riz_besiga: Beef strips with onions, green chilli and spices, served with rice.

about.title: Our story
about.p1: Savanna was born from a wish to share, here in Delémont, the flavours that shaped our childhood in Eritrea and Ethiopia. Every dish carries a memory: a cuisine passed from mother to daughter, from feast to feast.
about.quote: "At our table, no one eats from their own plate. We break the injera together."
about.p2: Our spices come straight from home. The injera is made fresh every morning, sourdough-style, and every wat simmers for hours until it finds its balance. Nothing is rushed — that is what makes the difference.
about.p3: The house is family-run. You may be welcomed by one of us, served by another, and leave — we hope — already wanting to come back.
about.team_text: A small family team in the kitchen and the dining room, sharing the same table since day one.
